variants.pronounced: きょうかんせいしゅうち
きょうかんじゅじゅつ

glosses: to share the good and the bad (with)
to stick together through thick and thin
appearing together (in a film, play, etc.)
second or third person plural (implies speaker is of higher status than those referred to)
five races under one union (Han, Manchurians, Mongolians, Hui, Tibetans; founding principle of the Republic of China)
harmony of the five races (Manchurians, Han, Mongolians, Koreans, Japanese; official policy of Manchukuo)
white hemp thread (as a betrothal gift, representing the hair of an old couple)
public bath or hot springs maintained by the local community and free or low fee

variants.pronounced: きょうどうよくじょう

glosses: sharing (files, devices on a network, posts on social media, etc.)
standard language (language variety understood throughout a country)
communal eating of food that has been offered to a god
